---
title: "intel.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/calculus/intel.ts"
loc: 10
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.65
style_score: 9.38
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 9.29
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `calculateIntelScore`
- `calculateIntelScore`
- `comments`
- `docRatio`
- `docScore`
- `exports`
- `exportScore`
- `rawScore`
